Enum esriRasterPrjMethodTypeEnum

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

The raster projection types.

[Guid("C81ABD72-A071-11D4-A68C-0008C7DF88A8")]
public enum esriRasterPrjMethodTypeEnum

Fields

esriRasterPrjMethodFull = 3

3: Project each point.

esriRasterPrjMethodGlobal = 0

0: Use global polynomial transformation in the projection.

esriRasterPrjMethodPieceWise2 = 2

2: Use piecewise polynomial (17X17 block) transformation in the projection.

esriRasterPrjMethodUserDefinedBlkSize = 4

4: Use piecewise polynomial(user defined block) transformation in the projection.

esriRasteraPrjMethodPieceWise1 = 1

1: Use piecewise polynomial(9X9 block) transformation in the projection.
